channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned sofa, 21st July
item.description:
End of De Beauvoir road, side of Kingsgate Estate - couch has been there for more than a week now. In progressively worse conditions

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost outside number 188 mayplace road east, 21st July
item.description:
A vehicle reversed into it yesterday quite sharply and I’d like to ensure it’s safe as it was quite an impact
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Road East, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin purposely placed back on the pavement, 21st July
item.description:
Tenant at 117 Riverdale Road has refused to move the bin from the pavement due to sometimes having to walk in the road when cars parked on the kerb are larger when asked to move the bin back on the property the tenant refused and said if they have to walk in the road sometimes then so should others and mother's with prams can do the same It is obstructing the pavement and this is not considerate at all of young and old. Please could you kindly notify the landlord of this behaviour in this HMO. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible abandoned car, 21st July
item.description:
Car has been there for at least 3 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensgate Mews, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches blocking pavement, 21st July
item.description:
Branches spilling over pavement causing a obstruction for prams and wheelchair users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rackham Close, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping under tree, 21st July
item.description:
Fly tipping found under the tree at the corner of chandler Way and Dalton close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandler Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st July
item.description:
Rubbish under the tree at the corner of chandler way and Dalton close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandler Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General Rubbish Diamond Street SE15, 21st July
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on the grass verge on Diamond Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandler Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter on layby and whole streach of road, 21st July
item.description:
Trash has been there for months, environmental hazard and eyesore
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish thrown into carpark, 21st July
item.description:
Redundant items keep getting thrown into the car park. Bike frame, sofa, clothes, car tire, pig foot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Debnams Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncollected waste, 21st July
item.description:
This corner property of Wilmington Square needs to be reported — endless waste / fly tipping / huge quantities of rubbish being produced from inside the building

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Wilmington Square, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags and dumped medication, 21st July
item.description:
Bags of rubbish and medication dumped under the tree at the corner of chandler Way and diamond street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandler Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping again, 21st July
item.description:
Flytipping in the same spot again blocking the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very overgrown trees totally across the pathway, 21st July
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Sandpiper Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree and weeds blocking pathway, 21st July
item.description:
The base of the tree and weeds along the path are making it difficult to pass. It is directly opposite where Nutfield Road opens onto frogley Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Frogley Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and overflowing bin, 21st July
item.description:
Overflowing bin and rubbish everywhere. Same for all bins down Maberley Road Please either get rid of them or clear them more regularly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Maberley Road, South Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish from chicken and pizza, 21st July
item.description:
People dumped their food and containers after buying from Chicken and Pizza. The littering goes up Blurton Rd ( second photo)towards the pub .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Shaftesbury Street, 21st July
item.description:
Waste has been left on the street and has encouraged more waste to be added. blocking the pathway. Been an issue for about a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shepherdess Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holls, 21st July
item.description:
There are various potholes between 8 and 12 Molash road. Some of them are so bad that when the B14 bus goes over them it makes the house vibrate/ shake

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Molash Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 21st July
item.description:
Flytipping been here about a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
